title_en: Imam Muhammad's Recension of the Muwatta
content_en:
Muhammad ibn al-Hasan ash-Shaybani was born in 132 AH in Wasit and grew up in Kufa, where he received his early education in the Islamic sciences. He became one of the most important jurists in Islamic history, serving as a student of both Imam Abu Hanifa and Imam Malik ibn Anas — a combination that gave him unparalleled access to the two most influential legal traditions of his era. His position as the principal student and systematizer of the Hanafi school, alongside his deep personal engagement with the Maliki tradition, made him uniquely positioned to transmit and analyze the Muwatta from a perspective shaped by engagement with both traditions.

Imam Muhammad studied directly under Imam Malik in Medina, sitting in his circles and receiving the Muwatta directly from him. He was one of the most important transmitters of the Muwatta, and the version that passed through him — known as Riwayat Muhammad ibn al-Hasan, or Imam Muhammad's recension — is one of the several recensions through which the Muwatta reached subsequent generations. This version has distinctive features that reflect Imam Muhammad's own scholarly choices about which traditions to include and how to organize them.

The most distinctive feature of Imam Muhammad's recension is the inclusion of his own legal commentary alongside Imam Malik's traditions. In each section, Imam Muhammad presents the traditions from Imam Malik and then adds his own assessment and the Hanafi position, sometimes agreeing with Imam Malik and sometimes explicitly disagreeing with him and stating the Hanafi view with its basis in other prophetic traditions or in legal reasoning. This dialogic structure makes Imam Muhammad's recension far more than a transmission of Imam Malik's collection — it is simultaneously a comparative legal treatise.

Imam Muhammad died in 189 AH, having produced a body of legal writing that shaped the Hanafi tradition for centuries. His recension of the Muwatta has been studied in Hanafi madrasas across the Islamic world as one of the foundational texts of the school, providing students with both the Maliki tradition in the form Imam Muhammad received it and the Hanafi response to it.
content_id:
Muhammad ibn al-Hasan asy-Syaibani lahir pada tahun 132 H di Wasit dan tumbuh di Kufah, tempat beliau menerima pendidikan awal dalam ilmu-ilmu Islam. Beliau menjadi salah satu ahli fikih terpenting dalam sejarah Islam, pernah menjadi murid sekaligus Imam Abu Hanifah maupun Imam Malik ibn Anas — sebuah kombinasi yang memberi beliau akses tak tertandingi kepada dua tradisi hukum paling berpengaruh di zamannya. Posisi beliau sebagai murid utama dan sistemator madzhab Hanafi, dipadukan dengan keterlibatan pribadinya yang mendalam dengan tradisi Maliki, menempatkan beliau secara unik untuk mentransmisikan dan menganalisis Al-Muwatta dari perspektif yang dibentuk oleh keterlibatan dengan kedua tradisi.

Imam Muhammad belajar langsung di bawah bimbingan Imam Malik di Madinah, duduk dalam halaqah-halaqahnya dan menerima Al-Muwatta langsung dari beliau. Beliau adalah salah satu transmitter Al-Muwatta yang paling penting, dan versi yang melewatinya — dikenal sebagai Riwayat Muhammad ibn al-Hasan, atau riwayat Imam Muhammad — adalah salah satu dari beberapa riwayat yang melaluinya Al-Muwatta sampai kepada generasi berikutnya. Versi ini memiliki fitur-fitur khas yang mencerminkan pilihan ilmiah Imam Muhammad sendiri tentang riwayat-riwayat mana yang hendak disertakan dan bagaimana mengaturnya.

Fitur paling khas dari riwayat Imam Muhammad adalah disertakannya komentar hukumnya sendiri bersama riwayat-riwayat Imam Malik. Dalam setiap bagian, Imam Muhammad menyajikan riwayat-riwayat dari Imam Malik kemudian menambahkan penilaiannya sendiri dan posisi madzhab Hanafi, kadang setuju dengan Imam Malik dan kadang tidak setuju. Karakter ganda ini — transmisi sekaligus respons — menjadikan riwayat Imam Muhammad jauh lebih dari sekadar salinan Al-Muwatta; ia merupakan dokumen dialog ilmiah antara tradisi Maliki dan Hanafi pada masa formatifnya.
